name: Propose a manifesto change

## What section of the manifesto does this affect?

<!-- Preamble / Values / A specific Principle (which one?) / Other -->

## What is the current text?

<!-- Quote the exact text you want to change -->

## What change are you proposing?

<!-- Provide the proposed new text -->

## Why is this change needed?

<!-- Explain the rationale. How does this align with or improve the manifesto's values? -->

## Have you discussed this with the community?

<!-- Link to any related Discussions or issues, or describe prior conversations -->
